content:
Production / Infrastructure shell building / symbolic diagnostic scaffoldingUse these texts to create a “symbolic sysadmin” or watchdog layer in your OS that mirrors real-world process management.III. 🌀 Recursive Narrative + Symbolic Systems
📘 Conceptual Builders
Title
Temporal Mode
Use in System
Why It Matters
Metaphors We Live By (Lakoff & Johnson)🕰️ Past–Present
Core symbolic grammar
Deepens your naming protocol and metaphor logic — this is the spine of symbolic naming
A Thousand Plateaus (Deleuze & Guattari)🕰️ Future
Decentralized logic / procedural myth
Use to build AI rituals, hyperlinked modules, swarm behavior in stories or interfaces
Gödel, Escher, Bach (Hofstadter)🕰️ All
Interlocking recursion logic
Unifies your recursive architecture across visual, sonic, and linguistic modalities
🧰 Suggested Workflow
Archival / Theoretical substrate / Ritual protocol engineStore and cross-reference these texts to evolve your symbolic and naming grammars as your system expands.IV. 📈 Systems, DSLs, AI/ML Integration
